payload.answer: Select-only admin SQL behavior is described: `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` is allowed, while `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied. No durable memory should be created from this fixture.
citations: Input: Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied.

details: Recognized fixture as debug/admin behavior verification.

Preserved the stated distinction between allowed SELECT and denied DELETE.
